title: potentilla × vilmoriniana
intro: Potentilla × vilmoriniana, also known as Vilmorin's cinquefoil, is a hybrid flowering plant in the rose family. It is a cross between Potentilla reptans and Potentilla crantzii, with the ability to grow in poor soils and withstand harsh weather conditions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of Potentilla × vilmoriniana, such as teas and infusions, have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and digestive problems.
